core_mechanism: A constrained variational extremization in which a scalar quantity is obtained by extremizing a cost functional (the 'size' of a codimension-one dividing surface plus an added lower-dimensional defect/boundary contribution) over competing candidate configurations and selecting the globally minimal extremum, with the dominant extremum exchanging as a control parameter varies (a competing-saddle selection producing a first-order-like transition).
brief_reason: The method computes a fine-grained information measure via a defect-extremal-surface / island prescription that extremizes an area-plus-defect functional and takes the minimal configuration, and the reported Page curve is exactly the switch in which extremal configuration dominates as the subsystem/time parameter varies.
